phase.title: Project Scaffold
phase.goal: KAPLAY + TypeScript setup, Vite build tooling, dev server, HTML shell, basic canvas

phase.title: Title Screen and Game Flow
phase.goal: Main menu scene, new game button, intro narrative beat, scene transitions

phase.title: Core Navigation and Floor Map
phase.goal: Room graph data model, floor map rendering, exit selection, room transitions, dungeon tick, discovery/fog

phase.title: HUD and Room Info
phase.goal: HP/mana/tick HUD bar, room description panel, room actions based on feature type

phase.title: Combat System
phase.goal: Turn-based combat scene, Fight/Spells/Bag/Run actions, HP/mana tracking, win/lose/flee, XP rewards

phase.title: Dialogue and NPC Interaction
phase.goal: Dialogue interaction view, NPC portrait, dialogue lines, conversation flow

phase.title: Spell System and Rune Forge
phase.goal: 26 runes, spell composition, rune forge scene, spell slots, affinity tracking

phase.title: Content Packs and Polish
phase.goal: JSON content for entities, dungeon floors, spells, items; save/load; game over; production build
